articles.title: France orders country's internet service providers to block Polymarket
articles.description: The regulator cited concerns over addictive mechanics, a lack of self-exclusion tools, and a high volume of French users bypassing previous financial restrictions.

articles.title: Trump targets Brazil's payments system while dollar stablecoins are quietly overtaking country's payments
articles.description: Washington views Brazil’s promotion of non-dollar payment channels, including Pix and the growth of stablecoins, as a potential threat to dollar-based trade, even as dollar-linked stablecoins account for about 90% of Brazil's crypto transactions.
